title: lichen_lora_l2_start(): documented error codes incomplete
description:
**Location:** firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lora_l2.h:100

**Contract issue:** The header says 'negative errno on failure' but doesn't specify which errno values can be returned.

**Actual return codes:**
- 0: Success (idempotent)
- -EINVAL: Not initialized
- -ECANCELED: Needs reinit after forced abort
- (pass-through from lora_config)

**Impact (P2):** Callers cannot reliably handle specific error cases without reading the implementation.

**Recommendation:** Update documentation:
```c
/**
 * @return 0 on success (idempotent if already running)
 * @retval -EINVAL lichen_lora_l2_init() not called
 * @retval -ECANCELED Module in undefined state, requires deinit/reinit cycle
 * @retval -ENODEV Radio configuration failed (from lora_config)
 */
```
